bundles.title: Lock Review Ledger Digest Contract
bundles.goal: Align the delta spec and implementation checklist around digest content, graceful degradation, and the watcher's read-only boundary before code wiring begins.
outputs: validated realtime-progress-ui digest and degradation delta
implementation checklist for Phase 1 summary fallback, empty-ledger placeholder, and no-new-events scope

tasks.title: Reconcile the design's digest fields, ranking order, and narrow-terminal behavior with the realtime-progress-ui delta scenarios
Confirm the read-only artifact contract covers family-mapped review-ledger paths and excludes all watcher writes and mutating review-ledger helpers
Freeze the Phase 1 handling for latest-summary fallback and empty-ledger placeholder semantics in an implementation checklist
Confirm subagent activity and new observation events remain out of scope for this change

bundles.title: Add Ledger Readers And Family Selection
bundles.goal: Provide tolerant review-ledger readers and a phase-to-ledger-family selector in the watcher's artifact layer.
inputs: validated realtime-progress-ui digest and degradation delta
implementation checklist for Phase 1 summary fallback, empty-ledger placeholder, and no-new-events scope
outputs: tolerant design/apply review-ledger readers and selectActiveReviewLedger

tasks.title: Add design and apply review-ledger path helpers plus readDesignReviewLedger and readApplyReviewLedger returning ok, absent, unreadable, or malformed
Implement a watcher-local ledger validator that only requires digest fields and tolerates unknown extras without side effects
Add selectActiveReviewLedger(currentPhase) and verify its family mapping stays in parity with selectActiveAutofixPhase
Extend specflow-watch reader tests for ok, absent, unreadable, malformed, and empty-round-summaries ledger cases

bundles.title: Build And Render Review Ledger Digest
bundles.goal: Derive a review-ledger digest from the latest persisted ledger state and render it compactly beneath the existing snapshot progress lines.
inputs: validated realtime-progress-ui digest and degradation delta
tolerant design/apply review-ledger readers and selectActiveReviewLedger
outputs: LedgerDigest model and digest rendering behavior

tasks.title: Extend the review section model with LedgerDigest or null plus placeholder and warning states derived from ledger reader results
Build digest decision, counts, open-severity totals, latest-summary fallback, and top-3 ranking from the last round_summaries entry plus open findings
Render digest lines below snapshot progress without changing existing snapshot and manual-fix behavior
Apply sub-80-column findings collapse and ellipsis truncation in the renderer only, keeping terminal width out of the model
Expand watch-renderer tests for populated digests, ranking tie-breakers, empty ledgers, warning states, and narrow versus wide terminal output

bundles.title: Wire Ledger Digest Through Specflow Watch
bundles.goal: Connect the new ledger readers and digest model through specflow-watch, including watched ledger paths and end-to-end redraw coverage.
inputs: tolerant design/apply review-ledger readers and selectActiveReviewLedger
LedgerDigest model and digest rendering behavior
outputs: design/apply ledger watch-path wiring and redraw coverage
read-only import-graph verification for ledger-digest wiring

tasks.title: Wire active ledger selection and tolerant ledger reads into buildModel and review-section construction in src/bin/specflow-watch.ts
Add design and apply review-ledger files to the watched path set and keep redraw behavior aligned with the existing polling fallback
Extend specflow-watch integration tests to cover initial digest render and redraw after ledger updates on disk
Re-check the import-graph guard so the new wiring does not pull in mutating review-ledger code or write-oriented APIs
